titles.title: I Will Enter His Gates With Thanksgiving

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will enter His gates with thanksgiving I will enter His courts with praise I will lift up a song of worship I will bless His holy name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our Lord God is so holy Mighty in all of His ways Our Lord God is so worthy Worthy of all our praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is the One Who has given Given my heart a brand new song I will sing to Him in worship Praising Him all day long

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will lift up a song of worship I will bless His holy name I will enter His gates with Thanksgiving I will bless His Holy name
